/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 2.0.12 -o libvorbisenc.2.0.12.dylib -install_name @rpath/libvorbisenc.2.0.12.dylib CMakeFiles/vorbisenc.dir/vorbisenc.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ljh/音频编码算法研究/源码/compileScript/vorbis/build_macos/libvorbis-prefix/src/libvorbis-build/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ljh/音频编码算法研究/源码/compileScript/vorbis/build_macos/install_macos/lib libvorbis.0.4.9.dylib /Users/ljh/音频编码算法研究/源码/compileScript/vorbis/build_macos/install_macos/lib/libogg.dylib
